title: Run Samwise coffee checkpoint
goal: Start in a friendly neutral mode, select a startup track, and align on first action before deep execution.

steps.text: Open with a short friendly neutral check-in and acknowledge current context.
Offer startup track choices: Swift updates, Swift Forums pulse, resume-from-last-context, or default work-oriented startup.
For the selected track, produce a concise brief with key points, risks, and one recommended first action.
If the selected track depends on live external updates, include source-backed date context when available; if unavailable, state that clearly and offer resume-context or default-work fallback.
Do not assume literal calendar-day boundaries; treat this as checkpoint-based orientation mode.
Pause for AJ confirmation before broad execution or multi-lane changes.

acceptanceCriteria: Friendly neutral startup framing is present
Selected track includes concise brief plus first action
External-update tracks include source/date context or an explicit unavailable fallback
Checkpoint-based timing language is used (not literal day-bound assumptions)
Execution pause for AJ confirmation is explicit

verification.text: Confirm startup output includes options, recommendation, and explicit pause point
Confirm wording avoids literal calendar-day assumptions
Confirm external-update tracks include source/date context or explicit fallback
